The '''Trailmaster''' was a low-end<ref name="CRFG" /> [[Surveillance tagger/Legends|surveillance tagger]]<ref name="EECore" /> produced by [[Astroserver Industries]]. It was only capable of providing directional information, had a range of a single [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometer]], and cost four hundred [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="CRFG" />
